name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states



(* Helper function to get the next philosopher/fork index *)
Next(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation: each philosopher can pick up or put down forks *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Next(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Next(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Type invariant: forks is a function from 1..N to BOOLEAN, states is a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN
          /\ states \in 1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

choose(i) == 
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : 
    (num[j] = 0) \/ 
    (num[j] > num[i]) \/ 
    ((num[j] = num[i]) /\ (j > i))

enter(i) == 
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : 
    (num[j] = 0) \/ 
    (num[j] > num[i]) \/ 
    ((num[j] = num[i]) /\ (j > i))

exit(i) == 
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N : 
    choose(i) \/ 
    enter(i) \/ 
    exit(i)

Init == 
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0 /\ flag[i] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] \in 0..N
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : flag[i] \in BOOLEAN
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : num[i] = 0 \/ flag[i] = FALSE

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ count' = count + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ count' = count - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
          /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
          /\ head \in 0..K-1
          /\ tail \in 0..K-1
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1) \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active \\
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
          /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS M, N

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value


  proposers = <<[ballot: 0, value: NULL] \in [ballot: Nat, value: STRING] : TRUE>>;  (* M proposers *)
  chosen = NULL;  (* chosen value *)

actions
  Prepare
  Accept
  Chosen
*)

(* State variables *)
acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: STRING]]
proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: STRING]]
chosen \in STRING

(* Helper definitions *)
Ballot = Nat
Value = STRING

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ acceptors = <<[ballot: 0, value: NULL] \in [ballot: Nat, value: STRING] : TRUE>>
        /\ proposers = <<[ballot: 0, value: NULL] \in [ballot: Nat, value: STRING] : TRUE>>
        /\ chosen = NULL

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..M, 
    /\ proposers[i].ballot' = proposers[i].ballot + 1
    /\ proposers[i].value' = proposers[i].value
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  \/ \E i \in 1..M, 
    /\ proposers[i].ballot' = proposers[i].ballot
    /\ proposers[i].value' = proposers[i].value
    /\ acceptors' = [j \in 1..N |-> 

            [ballot |-> proposers[i].ballot, value: proposers[i].value]

            acceptors[j]
        ]
    /\ chosen' = IF proposers[i].ballot >= acceptors[j].ballot /\ proposers[i].value /= NULL THEN proposers[i].value ELSE chosen
  \/ /\ acceptors' = acceptors
      /\ proposers' = proposers
      /\ chosen' = chosen

(* Invariant: chosen is never changed once set *)
ChosenInvariant == 
  \A i \in 1..M : \A j \in 1..N : 
    acceptors[j].value' = acceptors[j].value
    /\ proposers[i].value' = proposers[i].value

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: STRING]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: STRING]]
  /\ chosen \in STRING

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> TRUE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ \E j \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
            /\ j \notin sentChunks
            /\ channelState[j] = TRUE
            /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, j)
            /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![j] = FALSE]
            /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![j] = 0]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ retransmitCount[i] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState' = channelState
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>
